## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New curve / transform
- [ ] New CLI command or library API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (and new tests added if behaviour changed)
- [ ] `python tools/check_literal_size.py src/curveforge` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If adding a curve: cited source in module docstring + entry in README

## Additional context

Anything reviewers should know that isn't obvious from the diff.
